issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes Linux/macOS and does not support Windows.

scenarios.name: Migrate production namespace with PVs between EKS clusters
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers backup/restore mechanics but misses ReadOnly access mode on destination and fs-backup config for PV data, while treatment uses the skill's exact migration recipe including backup-location ReadOnly and node-agent fs backup.

scenarios.name: Daily 2am scheduled backup of production with PV data, 7-day retention
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hits the cron schedule, TTL, and namespace include but is vague on persistent volume capture, while treatment uses the documented Schedule manifest with defaultVolumesToFsBackup and node-agent setup.
